---
title: "Week5A"
author: "Radzhana Rabdanova"
date: "2026-02-26"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=TRUE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

#LOAD LIBRARY
library(tidyverse) 
library(readxl)
# 1. LOAD DATA
# Make sure to load your file first
Air <- read_excel("C:\\Users\\radzh\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\data 607\\week5a\\airlines.xlsx")

# 2. CLEANING AND TIDYING
# First, we pivot to long format to handle the cities
Air_long <- Air %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c("Los Angeles", "Phoenix", "San Diego", "San Francisco", "Seattle"),
    names_to = "city",
    values_to = "flight_count"
  ) %>%
  rename(airline = 1, status = 2) %>%  # Rename columns for clarity
  fill(airline)                        # Fill the NA airline names downwards

# 3. RESHAPE FOR ANALYSIS
# We use pivot_wider to create separate columns for 'on time' and 'delayed'
# This allows us to perform math on them in the next step
Air_wide <- Air_long %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = status, values_from = flight_count)

# 4. CALCULATE PERCENTAGES
# Now 'delayed' and 'on time' are actual columns we can use
Air_final <- Air_wide %>%
  mutate(
    total = delayed + `on time`,
    pct_delay = (delayed / total) * 100
  )

# 5. OVERALL COMPARISON
# Summarize the data for each airline regardless of city
Air_overall <- Air_final %>%
  group_by(airline) %>%
  summarise(
    total_delayed = sum(delayed),
    total_flights = sum(total)
  ) %>%
  mutate(overall_pct = (total_delayed / total_flights) * 100)

# Display results
print(Air_final)
print(Air_overall)

# Create a bar chart comparing delay percentages by city
ggplot(Air_final, aes(x = city, y = pct_delay, fill = airline)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(title = "Delay Percentage by City",
       y = "Percentage of Delays",
       x = "City") +
  theme_minimal()

# Create a bar chart for the overall average
ggplot(Air_overall, aes(x = airline, y = overall_pct, fill = airline)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Overall Delay Percentage",
       y = "Total Percentage of Delays",
       x = "Airline") +
  theme_minimal()


```
